race.comment: TRUE BLUE BILLY (3) is a promising dog in the frame at two of 12 starts including six wins and was a last start winner (17.49) over 300m at this track. Has the ability and expected to prove tough to beat again. CARL BRUCE (1) turned in a fair 4th placed finish last time at this track over 300m (17.60). Better than last start and can bounce back. SQUID WORTH (2) boxed on well to finish second last time, beaten 1.5 lengths (18.66) behind Kiando Estate at Dubbo. Will give a great sight again. YOUNG ENERGY (8) collected a minor prize last start and must be considered.
